# Project: Beta

## Objective
> Experimental data pipeline using MiniMax for entity extraction.

## Context
Partners with [[person_alice]] for data labeling. Uses the same streaming architecture as Project Alpha. Built on top of the Node.js pipeline tools we developed last quarter.
